title: Irish Tandoor Lamb Kebabs
description: A unique fusion of Irish and Indian flavors, these lamb kebabs are marinated in a spicy tandoor-inspired blend and grilled to perfection. Serve with a side of creamy sour cream.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine tandoor spice blend, lime juice, ginger, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Add the softened Irish butter to the blender and blend until well combined.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix until they are evenly coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the lamb kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they are cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Serve the lamb kebabs hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro and a dollop of sour cream on the side.
